trades.reasoning: Score 90 with RSI 65.4 in the ideal bullish momentum zone (not overbought), MACD bullish crossover, and price well above SMA-20 — best risk/reward among top candidates.
Score 90 with RSI 61.6 in bullish momentum zone and MACD crossover; Intel at $120.98 offers a lower-RSI entry than most screened names, reducing mean-reversion risk.

decisions.briefing: Risk-on session with S&P 500 +0.6% and NASDAQ +0.5% — a broad, orderly rally with no stress signals. With 4 open slots and $843 in cash, I'm deploying into the two score-90 names whose RSI sits in the bullish-but-not-overbought zone (61–66), avoiding the crowded overbought names scoring 70 where RSI readings of 78–88 raise pullback risk. Existing positions remain intact; auto stop-loss and profit targets continue to manage downside on those.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities posted a modest risk-on advance on May 22, with the S&P 500 gaining 0.6% and the NASDAQ up 0.5%, driven by continued optimism around AI infrastructure spending and resilient consumer data. Semiconductor and tech hardware names led the charge, with several names hitting multi-month highs on strong earnings revisions. No significant macro shock emerged to interrupt the grind higher, keeping investor sentiment constructive heading into the long weekend.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股5月22日延續風險偏好情緒，標普500指數上漲0.6%，納斯達克指數上漲0.5%，主要受人工智能基礎建設支出樂觀預期及穩健消費數據支撐。半導體及科技硬件板塊領漲，多隻個股刷新近數月高位，受惠於盈利預測上調。宏觀層面未有重大利空因素干擾，投資者情緒在長週末前保持正面。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: The Relative Strength Index (RSI) measures how fast a stock's price is moving on a scale of 0–100. A reading between 55–70 is often called the 'bullish momentum zone' — the stock is trending upward with room to run before becoming overbought. Readings above 70 signal overbought conditions, where a pullback becomes more likely, which is why today's decision favored RSI-65 names over RSI-85 names even though both had bullish MACD signals.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 相對強弱指數（RSI）以0至100的尺度衡量股價上漲的速度與力度。RSI介於55至70之間，通常被視為「強勢動能區」，代表股票處於上升趨勢且仍有上漲空間，尚未達到超買水平。RSI超過70則進入超買區域，回調風險上升。這也是今日決策偏好RSI約65的個股、而非RSI高達85個股的原因——即便兩者均顯示MACD看漲信號。
